features.name: divfloor cell instantiation in formal context
features.description: Code should include a $divfloor cell instantiation with A_WIDTH, B_WIDTH, Y_WIDTH, A_SIGNED, B_SIGNED parameters for floor division operation in formal verification

features.name: anyconst unconstrained wire for formal
features.description: Code should include $anyconst declarations to create unconstrained input wires in formal verification contexts

features.name: assume assertion in formal verification
features.description: Code should include an assume statement within an always @* block for formal property verification
